heading: Chapter continued in force and effect
label: 731e Chapter continued in force and effect
text: This chapter is continued in force and effect.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “the Act entitled ‘An Act to provide a civil government for Porto Rico, and for other purposes,’ approved , as amended”, meaning , , as amended, known as the Puerto Rican Federal Relations Act and also popularly known as the Jones Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.March 2, 1917act Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 14539 Stat. 951section 731 of this title
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Puerto Rican Federal Relations Act which comprises this chapter.
amendments: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “the Act entitled ‘An Act to provide a civil government for Porto Rico, and for other purposes,’ approved , as amended”, meaning , , as amended, known as the Puerto Rican Federal Relations Act and also popularly known as the Jones Act, which is classified principally to this chapter.
